level_signals: 2-3 years of experience in operations, technology, banking, analytics or related experience
Base range $78,200–$115,000 consistent with early-career IC

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: You have 2-3 years of experience in operations, technology, banking, analytics or related experience with a track record of leading initiatives and hitting goals
must_haves.qualifier: with track record of leading initiatives and hitting goals

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: You have strong communication skills and cross-functional experience

You are comfortable working with large data sets + modeling in Excel / Google Sheets, proficiency in SQL, and well-versed in data visualization tools (e.g. Sigma, Tableau) to help solve ambiguous problems
You are willing to roll up their sleeves and flex up or down as needed - "humble doer"
You have a Bachelor's degree or higher

scope.surface: Post Sales SMB Account Management — supporting SMB Rx Success Account Management for restaurant partners
scope.business_model: B2B marketplace (merchant-facing), sales operations within a platform serving restaurants, grocers, convenience stores, and retailers
core_responsibilities: Drive operational excellence in reporting cadences, rigorous pipeline tracking, and sales productivity
Lead end-to-end ideation to execution through data-driven insights
Partner with cross-functional teams to expand and elevate GTM processes across products and initiatives
Shepherd the Account Management team into the future by leveraging AI tooling to become more efficient
Optimize SMB Account Management operational processes

Comprehensive benefits package described including parental leave, 401(k), and wellness
